plugins.name: skill-creator

plugins.description: STAMP-based systems analysis: safety (STPA), security (STPA-Sec), and incident investigation (CAST)

plugins.description: Thinking and reasoning skills: first-principles analysis, divergent ideation, and Heilmeier Catechism research evaluation

plugins.name: writing-toolkit
plugins.description: Writing skills: Strunk's rules applied to any prose humans read

plugins.name: multi-agent-toolkit
plugins.description: Multi-agent coordination skills: council debates and parallel research

plugins.name: redteam
plugins.description: Adversarial analysis with parallel agent deployment: stress-test ideas and produce content through competition

plugins.name: dev-workflow-toolkit
plugins.description: Development workflow skills: brainstorming, planning, execution, debugging, testing, code review, and project scaffolding
